name: Honey Date Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine honey and eggs. Add vanilla.
2. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together.
3. Mix the dry ingredients into the honey and egg mixture.
4. Stir in the chopped nuts and dates.
5. Pour batter into a shallow, well-oiled pan.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for about 10 minutes.
7. Cut cookies into strips measuring 1 inch wide by 3 inches long.
8. Roll each cookie strip in powdered sugar.
36 servings
